name: Corporate (Modern)
description: A sleek, highly readable, and professional skin featuring subtle glassmorphism for corporate applications. Text is perfectly crisp.
css: ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; height: 6px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.3); border-radius: 3px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.5); } .card, .panel, .surface { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(203, 213, 225, 0.5) !important; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.025) !important; transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease-in-out; } .card:hover, .panel:hover { box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08), 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) !important; } .sidebar { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border-right: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.2) !important; } .header { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.2) !important; } input, select, textarea { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) !important; border-color: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.4) !important; color: #0f172a !important; transition: all 0.2s ease; } input:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus { background-color: #ffffff !important; border-color: #0f172a !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #0f172a !important; } body { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f8fafc 0%, #e2e8f0 100%); background-attachment: fixed; } .btn-primary { background: #0f172a !important; border: 1px solid #020617 !important; transition: all 0.2s ease; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.025em; text-shadow: none !important; } .btn-primary:hover { background: #1e293b !important; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.2) !important; } .btn-secondary { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) !important; border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.4) !important; color: #334155 !important; font-weight: 500; } .btn-secondary:hover { background: #ffffff !important; border-color: #94a3b8 !important; color: #0f172a !important; } .ai-paste-container { border-width: 1px !important; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ai-paste-container:hover { border-color: #0f172a !important; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 1) !important; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) !important; } .skin-sidebar-item { border-left: 3px solid transparent; border-radius: 0 !important; text-shadow: none !important; } .skin-sidebar-item.active { border-left-color: #0f172a !important; background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05) !important; font-weight: 600; } .badge { font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; }
